name: loan-amount-broker-mid-conversation-correct
rationale: Three-event sequence: intake states loan_amount $310k → broker follows up after Vienna prelim with mid-conversation correction to $345k → broker re-confirms $345k after Vienna acknowledgment. F1.LA canonical-map must propagate the corrected value via R10-G push machinery across the multi-turn thread. Tests temporal correction-tier resolution (latest correction wins; not first).
notes: Three-event sequence. Distinct from A01 (single correction): A06 tests push machinery durability across multiple in-thread corrections.
